_safeTransferOut(address,uint256).details: Internal helper — llamado via try/catch desde _splitFundsPerPurchase.      Marcado external para poder usarse con `try this._safeTransferOut(...)`,      protegido con msg.sender == address(this).

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

getTicketOwner(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: ticketOwner mapping is already public (auto-getter), but this      provides a clearer API name for frontend integration.

getUserTickets(uint256,uint256,address).details: Exposes the internal userTickets mapping for frontend consumption.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

resolveStuckRound(uint256,uint256).details: SECURITY FIX: Never uses block variables as randomness source for prizes.

testAccrueNXL(address,uint256,uint256).details: Expose internal NXL accrual function for testing

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

MAX_INVESTORS_PER_SETTLEMENT().notice: Máximo de inversores procesados por settlement (evita gas exhaustion en VRF callback)

continueSettlement(uint256,uint256).notice: Permite continuar el settlement si hay más de MAX_INVESTORS_PER_SETTLEMENT inversores.

emergencyPause().notice: M-01 FIX: pauseGuardian can pause even after renounceOwnership().

emergencyUnpause().notice: Unpause: requires owner before finalization, guardian after.

getTicketOwner(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Returns the owner of a specific ticket number in a round.

getUserTickets(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Returns all ticket numbers owned by a user in a specific round.

liquiditySettleIndex(uint256,uint256).notice: Índice del próximo inversor a liquidar (permite paginación si >100 inversores)

pauseGuardian().notice: Pause guardian survives renounceOwnership (set in constructor, immutable after finalizeAutonomy)

reactivateProduct(uint256).notice: HIGH-03 FIX: reactivateProduct callable by guardian OR owner.         After renounceOwnership, only guardian can reactivate.

resolveStuckRound(uint256,uint256).notice: Retries VRF for a stuck round. If VRF retry fails, pauses the round.

roundPrizeAccrued(uint256,uint256).notice: P-04 FIX: Dedicated flag replaces fragile claimableStable-based guard.

setCallbackGasLimit(uint32).notice: HIGH-04 FIX: setCallbackGasLimit callable by guardian OR owner.

setPauseGuardian(address).notice: Replace pauseGuardian before autonomy is finalized (owner only, one-time after).

settleRemainingPrincipal(uint256,uint256.notice: P-02 FIX: Store residual principal/profit per page to avoid O(N) re-iteration.         On each page, we read from storage instead of recalculating from scratch.

documentation.text: @dev Expose internal NXL accrual function for testing
